top_signals.reason: Boeing received two NASA contracts totaling over $32.9B combined, both over $1B threshold, with 31 corruption indicators flagged in cross-reference and 31 social mentions confirming dual-source corroboration triggering the cross-reference bonus. Multiple contract signals on the same entity apply the 1.3x multiplier producing a high-conviction score.

Boozman purchased two Treasury ETFs (IEF and IEI) on the same date triggering the multiple signals multiplier, suggesting a deliberate interest rate positioning move. Rotation out of IVW growth ETF earlier in March reinforces a defensive macro thesis.
Same-day purchase as IEF by the same senator triggers multiple signals multiplier on this ticker cluster. Paired Treasury positioning across maturities suggests informed rate-environment conviction.

Trump Jr posting about US strikes on Iran and drone attacks on commercial ships in Hormuz directly signals oil supply disruption risk. Iran escalation near Strait of Hormuz is a classic crude oil price shock catalyst; no additional cross-referencing signals to boost score further.

Military construction appropriations bill HR8469 passed House and received in Senate signals increased defense infrastructure spending benefiting military construction contractors. No sole-source contract or cross-signal confirmation available to push score higher at this time.

Howard Lutnick confirmed match at 100% in Paradise Papers offshore data earns +30pts but no corroborating trade, contract, or legislative signal ties to a specific actionable equity. Insufficient cross-referencing to justify directional trade beyond monitoring.

Tillerson confirmed 100% match in Paradise Papers offshore entity data earns +30pts, but no current legislative, contract, or social signal cross-references this to a specific trade action. Monitor for emerging energy policy signals that could activate this indicator.
Senate sale of eToro at meaningful size warrants attention as a congressional signal. No cross-reference or contract signals to amplify conviction.
Congressional purchase of First Citizens Bancorporation scores baseline congressional signal only. Small size and no corroborating indicators limit conviction.
Senate purchase of JPMorgan Chase scores baseline congressional signal. Small size and no cross-reference data reduce actionability.
Senate purchase of PepsiCo scores base congressional signal with moderate size. No corroborating contracts or cross-reference data present.
Sale of S&P 500 Growth ETF scores base congressional signal. Combined with later Treasury bond purchases suggests a deliberate defensive rotation strategy.
Senate purchase of Eaton Corp scores base congressional signal. Small size and no contract or cross-reference corroboration limit actionability.
Bechtel National received a $17.2B Department of Energy contract exceeding the $1B threshold for a base score. However Bechtel is privately held with no tradeable ticker, limiting actionability.
